name: STATUS CHIP
purpose: A status marker that survives color-blindness and bad projectors: outlined chip, status-colored dot, the status word in ink.
rules: the word is mandatory; the dot and border alone are never a status
text in ink on the page background, so contrast never depends on the status color
width is set by the caller (deterministic), not measured from text
qa: text contrast is the page's ink contrast, independent of status hue
